name: be quiet! PURE BASE 501 Black Mid-Tower ATX Computer Case - 2x Preinstalled Pure Wings 3 140mm PWM fans - Rotatable PCIe Slots - USB 3.2 Gen. 2 Type-C (BG073)
shortName: be quiet! PURE BASE 501 Black Mid-Tower ATX Computer Case - 2x
